meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Stuck with Basic Apps
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a scalable client workflow and overcome being stuck with basic apps. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for speed.
content.answer_block: Break free from the 'basic app' trap by implementing a modular, AI-driven scaffolding workflow. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid UI composition and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, you transform manual coding into a repeatable assembly line, allowing you to ship professional-grade SaaS features in a fraction of the time.
content.intro:
The screen stares back at you, blank and daunting. You have the vision, but your current process is trapped in a cycle of repetitive boilerplate and manual debugging. You're building basic apps because your workflow lacks the leverage to handle complexity at scale, leaving you exhausted while your clients wait for results.

It is time to evolve. By integrating autonomous coding agents into your development pipeline, you shift from being a manual laborer to an architectural lead. This isn't just about faster code; it is about reclaiming your autonomy and delivering high-value products that actually move the needle for your clients.

steps.title: Define the Modular Schema
steps.description: Before writing code, define your data architecture to ensure consistency across projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized JSON schema for a SaaS user-auth and subscription module that can be reused across multiple freelance projects.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate boilerplate based on schema.json'

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the visual layer, ensuring your UI is client-ready from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a clean, responsive React landing page using Tailwind CSS, including a hero section, pricing table, and contact form.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'apply tailwind styles to components'

steps.title: Inject Logic via Claude Code
steps.description: Automate the backend logic by feeding your architecture into Claude Code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase-compatible API route for handling user registration and JWT authentication.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement secure auth logic in backend folder'

steps.title: Automated Testing Pipeline
steps.description: Stop manual QA. Use Claude Code to write unit tests for every new feature you ship.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Jest test suites for all API routes generated in the previous step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and run tests for all backend endpoints'

steps.title: Client-Ready Documentation
steps.description: Generate professional README files that explain the architecture to your clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md file that summarizes the app functionality and setup instructions for a non-technical client.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Golden Repository' of your most successful components to feed into Claude Code's context window.
Use Claude Code's `--watch` mode to automatically lint and fix errors as you type in your IDE.
Never ship an app without a custom 'Admin Dashboard' scaffolded by Antigravity—clients pay a premium for control.
Use environment variable templates to instantly switch between staging and production environments.
Treat your AI agents like junior developers: give them precise constraints and force them to output logs for every major function.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is deployed, move on to building a custom CLI tool to automate your specific deployment pipeline, reducing your 'time-to-live' to under 5 minutes.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for entry-level builds. Master the workflow that separates the professional freelancers from the hobbyists. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
